title: psyllium suffruticosum
intro: Psyllium suffruticosum, also known as Indian plantago or small plantain, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae), characterized by its small, rounded leaves and seed pods. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of mucilage and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Psyllium suffruticosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower cholesterol levels, and help manage blood sugar levels. Psyllium suffruticosum can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, or consumed as a tea by infusing its dried leaves in hot water.
